Discover Your Rhythm

Where Passion Meets Precision in the Vibrant Heart of Tokyo.

View Our Classes Book a Trial Lesson

About Our Studio

Our Story

Established amidst the dynamic energy of Shibuya, Tokyo, Sakura Dance Studio began with a simple yet profound vision: to create a welcoming sanctuary where individuals of all ages and skill levels could connect with the transformative power of dance. From our founding years, we have been dedicated to building a community that supports creativity, encourages personal growth, and celebrates the universal language of movement. Our journey started in a modest space, fueled by a deep passion for various dance forms and a commitment to excellence in instruction. Over time, we've grown, attracting talented instructors and enthusiastic students who together form the vibrant tapestry of our studio. Every step, every class, every performance is a testament to the dedication and joy shared within our walls.

Our Mission

At Sakura Dance Studio, our mission is to empower every student to discover and express their unique voice through the art of dance. We provide high-quality technical training in a diverse range of styles, while fostering an environment that nurtures confidence, discipline, and a lifelong love for dance. We strive to be a positive force in the Tokyo dance community, offering programs that are accessible, inspiring, and challenging. Our goal is not just to teach steps, but to cultivate artistry, build resilience, and help individuals achieve their full potential, both as dancers and as people. We are committed to creating a space where everyone feels seen, valued, and encouraged to blossom.

Why Dance With Us?

Experienced Instructors

Our dedicated team consists of seasoned dance professionals with impressive backgrounds in performance, choreography, and education. They are passionate about sharing their expertise and providing personalized guidance to help you master techniques and unleash your potential in a supportive environment.

Diverse Class Offerings

Whether you're drawn to the elegance of Ballet, the energy of Hip-Hop, the expression of Contemporary, or the rhythm of Jazz, we have a class for you. Our curriculum caters to all levels and interests, offering a rich tapestry of dance styles to explore and specialize in.

Supportive Community

Join the Sakura family! We pride ourselves on fostering a warm, inclusive, and encouraging atmosphere. Our studio is a place where friendships are made, where students uplift each other, and where everyone feels welcome to share their journey and passion for dance.

Performance Opportunities

Gain valuable stage experience and showcase your progress! We provide exciting opportunities throughout the year, including our annual recitals, showcases, and community events, allowing students to share their artistry and celebrate their achievements.

Our Classes

Ballet

Classical ballet is the foundation of many dance forms, emphasizing posture, grace, strength, and precision. Our ballet program guides students through fundamental techniques, barre work, center combinations, and classical variations, building discipline and artistry. We offer classes tailored for various age groups and skill levels, from introductory courses for beginners to advanced technique classes for experienced dancers. Improve flexibility, coordination, and musicality while embracing the timeless beauty of ballet.

Hip-Hop

Groove to the beat and master the latest street styles in our high-energy Hip-Hop classes. Learn foundational moves, popping, locking, breaking, and fluid choreography set to contemporary music. These classes focus on rhythm, body control, performance quality, and self-expression in a fun and encouraging environment. Perfect for developing confidence and a unique urban style.

Jazz

Jazz dance is known for its syncopated rhythms, strong lines, and expressive movements. Our classes explore a range of jazz styles, from classic Broadway and Fosse-inspired movements to contemporary jazz techniques. Develop flexibility, strength, turns, leaps, and stylized choreography. Jazz is a versatile and exciting form that allows for significant personal expression and performance flair.

Contemporary

Contemporary dance blends techniques from various styles, focusing on fluidity, floor work, expression, and innovative movement. Explore concepts of weight, momentum, breath, and connection. These classes encourage dancers to push their physical and artistic boundaries, fostering creativity and emotional depth through movement improvisation and dynamic choreography.

Kids Dance Programs

Our programs for young dancers introduce the joy of movement in a playful and nurturing setting. Through creative activities, music, and basic technique, children develop coordination, rhythm, posture, and social skills. Classes available for preschoolers through early teens, building a positive foundation and instilling a lifelong love for dance.

Adult Workshops & Private Lessons

It's never too late to start or deepen your dance journey! We offer engaging workshops for adults covering various styles and themes, perfect for trying something new or honing specific skills. Private lessons provide personalized, one-on-one instruction tailored precisely to your goals, whether for technique refinement, choreography, or building confidence.

Class Schedule

Ready to plan your dance journey? Below is an overview of our weekly class schedule. Please note that specific timings and availability can change seasonally or based on demand. For the most current information and to inquire about space in a particular class, we encourage you to contact us directly.

Our detailed schedule includes classes from Monday to Saturday, covering all levels from beginner to advanced. We offer morning, afternoon, and evening options to fit busy lifestyles in Tokyo.

Contact Us About Availability

Studio Gallery

Step into the vibrant world of Sakura Dance Studio through our gallery. See moments captured from classes, performances, workshops, and glimpses of our beautiful, inspiring space. Experience the energy, passion, and community that define us.

Hear From Our Students

The best way to understand the Sakura Dance Studio experience is through the voices of our students and their families. Read what our community members in Tokyo have to say about their time dancing with us.

Sakura Dance Studio has been an incredible place for my daughter Yuki to grow. The instructors are amazing, not just technically skilled but also incredibly patient and encouraging. The studio feels like a second family, a truly positive and supportive environment where young dancers can build confidence and passion. We are so grateful to be part of this community in Shibuya!
Mai Tanaka (Parent of Yuki Tanaka, Kids Program)
I decided to try Hip-Hop in my 30s, and honestly, I was nervous. But Sakura Studio made it so much fun! The adult beginner class was welcoming, and the instructor broke down moves clearly. I never thought I could pick up choreography, but I am! It’s a fantastic workout and a great way to de-stress after work. I look forward to class every week!
Kenji Sato (Adult Hip-Hop Class Student)
The Contemporary class pushed my boundaries and helped me find new ways to express myself through movement that I never knew were possible. The focus on artistry alongside technique has been transformative. The instructors create a safe space to explore emotion and vulnerability. Highly recommend for anyone wanting to connect deeply with their dance.
Emi Kobayashi (Contemporary Class Student)
My son, Ren, loves the Kids Hip-Hop class! Before joining Sakura, he was a bit shy, but now he's dancing around the house all the time. The teachers are excellent at making learning fun and keeping the kids engaged. Seeing his confidence grow has been amazing. Thank you, Sakura Dance Studio!
Hiroshi Yamaoka (Parent of Ren Yamaoka, Kids Program)
After retiring, I wanted to stay active and tried the adult Ballet class. It’s challenging but so rewarding. The technique is taught with such clarity and patience. I feel stronger and more graceful already. It’s a lovely group of people and a truly enriching experience right here in Shibuya.
Akiko Suzuki (Adult Ballet Class Student)
I joined the Jazz intermediate class to improve my versatility. The choreography is creative and pushes you technically. The atmosphere is encouraging, and dancing alongside talented peers motivates me. The studio space is also fantastic – clean and spacious. A top-notch studio!
Daisuke Nakamura (Jazz Intermediate Student)
Attending workshops at Sakura has been a highlight of my dance training. They bring in amazing guest artists, and the content is always fresh and inspiring. It’s a fantastic way to learn new approaches and connect with other dancers passionate about their craft. Highly recommend their workshop series!
Nana Yoshida (Workshop Participant)

Find Us in Shibuya

Our Address

We are conveniently located in the heart of Tokyo's vibrant Shibuya district.

2-10-5 Shibuya Building, 3F,
Dogenzaka,
Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0043,
Japan

Getting Here

Sakura Dance Studio is just a short and pleasant walk from the iconic Shibuya Station, a major transportation hub served by multiple JR and Tokyo Metro lines (Yamanote, Saikyo, Shonan-Shinjuku, Ginza, Hanzomon, Fukutoshin, Tokyu Den-en-toshi, Tokyu Toyoko, Keio Inokashira). Look for the Shibuya Building near the Dogenzaka area. Our entrance is on the 3rd floor. Detailed walking directions from specific station exits are available upon request when you contact us.

Get In Touch

Have questions about our classes, trial lessons, schedule, studio rental, or anything else? We'd love to hear from you! Fill out the form below or contact us directly using the details provided.

Send Us a Message

Or Contact Us Directly

Prefer to call or email? Reach us via:

Phone: (03) 6416-8765
Email: info@

Our studio is open during class hours. Please call ahead if you plan to visit outside of your scheduled class time.
